NH3 Cattle

Lorenzo Benedetti

2026-03-17

rm(list = ls())   


setwd("/Users/lorenzobenedetti/Documents/GitHub/Benedetti-2026-N2O-AgroscenaNext/Rstudio/Dynamic chambers")


library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(ggplot2)
library(car)
## Loading required package: carData
## 
## Attaching package: 'car'
## The following object is masked from 'package:dplyr':
## 
##     recode
library(emmeans)
## Welcome to emmeans.
## Caution: You lose important information if you filter this package's results.
## See '? untidy'
library(FSA)
## Registered S3 methods overwritten by 'FSA':
##   method       from
##   confint.boot car 
##   hist.boot    car
## ## FSA v0.10.1. See citation('FSA') if used in publication.
## ## Run fishR() for related website and fishR('IFAR') for related book.
## 
## Attaching package: 'FSA'
## The following object is masked from 'package:car':
## 
##     bootCase
library(performance)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
## 
## Attaching package: 'kableExtra'
## The following object is masked from 'package:dplyr':
## 
##     group_rows
data <- read_excel("Cattle Final NH3.xlsx")


data <- data %>% rename(NH3_TN = `N-NH3 perc TAN`)
data$TREATMENT <- as.factor(data$TREATMENT)

# -------------------------------
# Descriptive statistics
# -------------------------------
desc <- data %>%
  group_by(TREATMENT) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(NH3_TN, na.rm=TRUE),
    sd = sd(NH3_TN, na.rm=TRUE),
    se = sd / sqrt(n()),
    n = n()
  )

kable(desc, caption="Statistiche descrittive per trattamento") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width=FALSE, position="center")
Statistiche descrittive per trattamento
TREATMENT mean sd se n
CSAA 9.232399 1.8010390 1.0398303 3
CSH2SO4 9.173655 2.2091002 1.2754246 3
CSRAW 14.355012 0.8008183 0.4623527 3 
# -------------------------------
# One way ANOVA
# -------------------------------
model <- lm(NH3_TN ~ TREATMENT, data = data)

kable(summary(model)$coefficients, caption="Sommario modello lineare") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width=FALSE, position="center")
Sommario modello lineare
Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>&#124;t&#124;)
(Intercept) 9.2323985 0.9868679 9.3552523 0.0000846
TREATMENTCSH2SO4 -0.0587435 1.3956420 -0.0420907 0.9677921
TREATMENTCSRAW 5.1226134 1.3956420 3.6704351 0.0104488 
anova_res <- anova(model)
kable(anova_res, caption="ANOVA") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width=FALSE, position="center")
ANOVA
Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)
TREATMENT 2 53.09108 26.545539 9.085571 0.0152954
Residuals 6 17.53035 2.921725 NA NA 
# -------------------------------
# Non parametrical tests
# -------------------------------
kruskal_res <- kruskal.test(NH3_TN ~ TREATMENT, data = data)
kruskal_res
## 
##  Kruskal-Wallis rank sum test
## 
## data:  NH3_TN by TREATMENT
## Kruskal-Wallis chi-squared = 5.4222, df = 2, p-value = 0.06646
dunn_res <- dunnTest(NH3_TN ~ TREATMENT, data = data, method="bonferroni")
##   Kruskal-Wallis rank sum test
## 
## data: x and g
## Kruskal-Wallis chi-squared = 5.4222, df = 2, p-value = 0.07
## 
##                      Dunn's Pairwise Comparison of x by g                     
##                                  (Bonferroni)                                 
## Col Mean-│
## Row Mean │       CSAA    CSH2SO4
## ─────────┼──────────────────────
##  CSH2SO4 │   0.149071
##          │     1.0000 
##          │
##    CSRAW │  -1.937925  -2.086996
##          │     0.1579     0.1107 
## 
## α = 0.05
## Reject Ho if p ≤ α, where p = Pr(|Z| ≥ |z|)
dunn_res
## Dunn (1964) Kruskal-Wallis multiple comparison
##   p-values adjusted with the Bonferroni method.
##        Comparison          Z    P.unadj     P.adj
## 1  CSAA - CSH2SO4  0.1490712 0.88149745 1.0000000
## 2    CSAA - CSRAW -1.9379256 0.05263230 0.1578969
## 3 CSH2SO4 - CSRAW -2.0869968 0.03688843 0.1106653
# -------------------------------
# Post-hoc Tukey
# -------------------------------
posthoc <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ TREATMENT, adjust="tukey")

kable(as.data.frame(posthoc$emmeans), caption="Medie marginali") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width=FALSE, position="center")
Medie marginali
TREATMENT emmean SE df lower.CL upper.CL
CSAA 9.232399 0.9868679 6 6.817620 11.64718
CSH2SO4 9.173655 0.9868679 6 6.758876 11.58843
CSRAW 14.355012 0.9868679 6 11.940233 16.76979 
kable(as.data.frame(posthoc$contrasts), caption="Contrasti Tukey") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width=FALSE, position="center")
Contrasti Tukey
contrast estimate SE df t.ratio p.value
CSAA - CSH2SO4 0.0587435 1.395642 6 0.0420907 0.9990239
CSAA - CSRAW -5.1226134 1.395642 6 -3.6704351 0.0243359
CSH2SO4 - CSRAW -5.1813569 1.395642 6 -3.7125257 0.0231811 
# -------------------------------
# Diagnostic for ANOVA
# -------------------------------
shapiro_res <- shapiro.test(residuals(model))
shapiro_res
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  residuals(model)
## W = 0.90634, p-value = 0.2911
levene_res <- leveneTest(NH3_TN ~ TREATMENT, data = data)
levene_res
## Levene's Test for Homogeneity of Variance (center = median)
##       Df F value Pr(>F)
## group  2  0.3092 0.7451
##        6
check_model(model)

par(mfrow=c(2,2))
plot(model)

par(mfrow=c(1,1))

# -------------------------------
# Boxplot 
# -------------------------------
ggplot(data, aes(x=TREATMENT, y=NH3_TN, fill=TREATMENT)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x="Trattamento", 
    y="N-NH3 (% of TN)",
    title="Percentuale di N-NH3 sul totale N per trattamento"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position="none")
